name: Pate Brisee
recipeIngredient: 1 cup unsalted butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or on a pastry board, combine the flour and salt.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture forms pea-sized crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center and pour in half of the water. Mix with your fingertips.
4. Gradually add more water as needed until the dough holds together without being kneaded.
5. Form the dough into a flat cake, wrap in plastic, and chill until ready to use.
Roll out and use as desired.
